pools.text: We teach only in pools that meet strict safety and hygiene standards, with constant temperature monitoring.

supervision.title: Lifeguard supervision
supervision.text: Every lesson is supervised by certified lifeguards to ensure maximum safety for all children.

facilities.title: Clean & hygienic facilities
facilities.text: Our pools are cleaned daily, and water quality is tested multiple times per day according to Dutch regulations.

emergency.title: Emergency readiness
emergency.text: Our team is trained in emergency response, CPR, and child rescue techniques to ensure a safe environment.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything parents want to know

items.question: How long does it take to get a swimming diploma?
items.answer: This depends on age, confidence, and lesson frequency. Most children earn diploma A in approximately 12–18 months with weekly lessons. With Progress+ or private lessons, progress is often faster.

items.question: What should my child bring to the first lesson?
items.answer: A swimsuit, towel, and slippers are enough. We provide all floating materials and safety equipment.

items.question: Can parents watch the lessons?
items.answer: Yes! All pools have viewing areas where parents can watch comfortably.

items.question: What if my child is afraid of water?
items.answer: Our instructors are trained in helping anxious swimmers. We start slowly, build trust, and use playful exercises to help children feel safe and confident.

items.question: Do you offer private lessons?
items.answer: Yes, we offer 1‑on‑1 private lessons and duo lessons. These are ideal for faster progress or children who need extra attention.

items.question: What locations do you teach at?
items.answer: We teach in multiple warm, child‑friendly pools. You can choose the location that works best for your schedule.

faq.more_subtitle: Our team is here to help you with anything related to swimming lessons.

items.title: Safety First
items.description: Safety always comes first. Our instructors are fully certified and trained in child‑friendly methods.

items.title: Fun & Confidence
items.description: Children learn fastest when they enjoy themselves. We build confidence at every step.

items.title: Personal Attention
items.description: Small groups and personal guidance ensure maximum progress.
